# Emberveil — A Dark-Fantasy Party RPG

> An atmospheric dark-fantasy party RPG built in the browser. 20 hero classes, 84 skills, turn-based tactical combat. Free to play.

## About
Emberveil is developed by Radley Sustaire (Veneta, OR) with AI assistance via Claude Code. Started as an experiment, the project spans 120+ development milestones documented publicly.

## Key URLs
- [Home](https://emberveil.radgh.com/): Marketing page with stats and hero roster
- [Play](https://emberveil.radgh.com/play.html): Playable game
- [News](https://emberveil.radgh.com/news/): Development milestones and devlog
- [Contact](https://emberveil.radgh.com/contact.html): Feedback and contact info
- [Art Gallery](https://emberveil.radgh.com/assets/): Generation prompts and art manifest

## Core Stats
- 20 playable hero classes (5 starter, 15 unlockable)
- 84 combat skills with talent upgrades
- 28+ unique enemy types across 6 acts
- 10 companion pets
- 46 base items with procedural affixes

## Technology
JavaScript, Vite, HTML5 Canvas. Art generated via OpenAI, SpriteCook, PixelLab. Audio via ElevenLabs.

## Rights
© 2026 Radley Sustaire. Free to play in browser.
